blocked_by: PI approval of D004-MC-001 or an amended construction rule

recommended_approval_summary.ghi_rule: KNMI Q converted to hourly-average W/m2 and repeated over four quarter-hour sub-intervals
recommended_approval_summary.local_timestamp_rule: derive Europe/Amsterdam timestamps from UTC instants
recommended_approval_summary.temperature_rule: KNMI T divided by 10 and repeated over four quarter-hour timestamps
